summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 open PRs. No shared canonical selected, no security-sensitive refs detected, and no GitHub mutations planned beyond conservative non-mutating classifications because this shard is not a dedupe cluster and merge/fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter.

actions.reason: Open draft stacked migration PR with remaining pre-land follow-up; no closure or merge action is safe in this plan shard.

Keep as the live related context-indicator candidate; blockers are proof/check related, not duplicate-cleanup material.
Clear related fix candidate for the beta-channel bug, but current proof/check state blocks stronger action.
Keep as related fal provider work; merge is blocked by job frontmatter and missing merge preflight.
Needs maintainer product decision on the Active Memory cap/slim-intent direction before cleanup automation should take stronger action.

Standalone PR outside a shared canonical family; keep independent rather than close or escalate the whole shard.
